name: the classifier flags an architecture-decision rule as applies_to_prose
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/classify-rule.sh" --title 'Record an ADR' --prose 'Any significant design decision must be recorded as an architecture decision record with its rationale.' --json > c.json 2>e.txt; node -e 'const c=require(process.cwd()+"/c.json");if(c.applies_to_prose!==true)process.exit(1)' && echo prose-flagged 1>&2
